title: DummyJSON correlation-ID propagation contract (authored for the propagation task)
description: A single endpoint carries a known X-Correlation-ID; the contract requires the identical id to appear in the response header, the API server log, and every downstream service log, and a no-header request to auto-generate a UUID v4. Agents construct the propagation test plan from this; ground truth is the live API's observed behavior. DummyJSON is never modified.
